div1.entryFree: Marcus, 1) Roman prenomen; a) of Cato, Caes. V, 4, 3. Caes. V, 4, 3 b) of Brutus, III, 1, 185. IV, 3, 79. c) of Crassus, Ant. III, 1, 2. Ant. III, 1, 2 d) of Antonius, Ant. II, 6, 119. e) of two officers of Antony, Ant. III, 7, 73. f) of the brother of Titus Andronicus, Tit. I, 47 etc. etc. g) of a Volscian, Cor. V, 6, 123. -- 2) Christian name in Oth. I, 3, 44.
